free_text: Neutron-Induced Gamma-Ray Production in Calcium in the
Sample thickness 0.041 atoms/barn. Sample oriented at
45 degrees with respect to incident beam.
efficiency for determination of incident beam
absorption, and neutron self-shielding in sample.
Complete error analysis, errors given do not
include a 10% uncertainty in absolute normalization.
Data received on magnetic tape, Perey, Oct. 1973.
